creator: pautina@kharkiv.net
text:
Hello.
The OSPF (FRR 4.0) does not want connect with neighbors until I set the network card promisc mode:

ifconfig bxe0 promisc

on this mode all working.

Other neighbors see this  neighbor and it is constantly in INIT mode.

Found a link to pfsense with a description of the problem: https://redmine.pfsense.org/issues/8324

FreeBSD virtualbox0.isp.kh.ua 11.2-PRERELEASE FreeBSD 11.2-PRERELEASE #0 r332927: Tue Apr 24 14:02:31 EEST 2018     pautina@virtualbox0:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/VIRTUALBOX  amd64
